title: WHIMZEES Puppy Stix, Natural and Grain Free Dog Chews, Puppy Dental Sticks, 28 Pieces, Size XS/S
features: DAILY DENTAL CARE FOR PUPPIES: Our treats not only complement any puppy's daily feeding routine, they also reduce plaque and tartar and freshen breath.
SOFT: Our WHIMZEES treats are specially developed for the sensitive teeth and gums of your puppy. Easy to hold with paws!
HEALTHY TEETH AND STRONG BONES: The calcium in the snacks ensures healthy teeth and strong bones. Cleans even the most difficult-to-reach gaps.
HYPOALLERGEN: Our snacks for puppies are grain free, sugar free, completely natural and meat free, perfect for food-sensitive dogs.
VERY SMALL AND SMALL BREED PUPPIES: Our puppy chews are specially designed for small breed puppies (body weight 2-9 kg). For dogs from 3 to 9 months. One snack per day.
